title: Slovakian Caraway Seed Focaccia
description: A dense and rich Slovakian-inspired focaccia infused with the warm flavor of caraway seeds, perfect for a German-style snack or side.
instructions: Activate the yeast by mixing it with 100ml of warm water.
Combine the rye flour, caraway seeds, and salt in a large bowl.
Add the yeast mixture, olive oil, and sour cream to the dry ingredients.
Mix the dough until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it's well-developed.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a rectangle.
Place the dough on a baking sheet, drizzle with olive oil, and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the focaccia from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before slicing.
